# PromptTemplate

> Prompt template for A/B testing and version tracking

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| name | string | yes | - | Template identifier |
| description | string | yes | - | What this template does |
| category | string | yes | - | Prompt category |
| currentVersionId | string | yes | - | ID of the active version |
| totalVersions | integer | yes | 0 | Number of versions |
| abTestingEnabled | boolean | yes | false | Whether A/B testing is active |
| metadata | json | yes | - | Additional template metadata |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## Relations

- hasMany **PromptVersion** (via `templateId`)

- `GET /api/prompt-template` — List all
- `POST /api/prompt-template` — Create
